mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psd.id, psd.parent_id, psd.dept_name, psd.dept_level, psd.dept_order, psd.data_status FROM sys_dept psd WHERE psd.enabled = '1' AND psd.id = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT csd.id, csd.parent_id, csd.dept_name, csd.dept_level, csd.dept_order, csd.data_status FROM sys_dept csd, temp tsd WHERE csd.enabled = '1' AND tsd.id = csd.parent_id ) SELECT tsd.id, tsd.parent_id, tsd.dept_name, tsd.dept_level, tsd.data_status FROM temp tsd ORDER BY tsd.dept_order, tsd.id

SELECT sd.id, sd.parent_id, sd.dept_name, sd.dept_level, sd.data_status FROM sys_dept sd WHERE sd.enabled = '1' START WITH sd.id = #{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sd.id = sd.parent_id ORDER BY sd.dept_order, sd.id

WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psd.id, psd.parent_id FROM sys_dept psd WHERE psd.parent_id = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT csd.id, csd.parent_id FROM sys_dept csd, temp tsd WHERE tsd.id = csd.parent_id ) SELECT id FROM temp
SELECT id FROM sys_dept sd START WITH sd.parent_id = #{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sd.id = sd.parent_id

WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psd.id, psd.parent_id FROM sys_dept psd WHERE psd.enabled = '1' AND psd.parent_id = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT csd.id, csd.parent_id FROM sys_dept csd, temp tsd WHERE csd.enabled = '1' AND tsd.id = csd.parent_id ) SELECT id FROM temp
SELECT id FROM sys_dept sd WHERE sd.enabled = '1' START WITH sd.parent_id = #{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sd.id = sd.parent_id
WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psd.* FROM sys_dept psd WHERE psd.id = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT csd.* FROM sys_dept csd, temp tsd WHERE tsd.id = csd.parent_id ) SELECT * FROM temp

SELECT id, parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, dept_level, dept_type, data_status, dept_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, enabled FROM sys_dept sd START WITH sd.id = #{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sd.id = sd.parent_id

WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psd.* FROM sys_dept psd WHERE psd.enabled = '1' AND psd.id = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT csd.* FROM sys_dept csd, temp tsd WHERE csd.enabled = '1' AND tsd.id = csd.parent_id ) SELECT * FROM temp

SELECT id, parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, dept_level, dept_type, data_status, dept_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, enabled FROM sys_dept sd WHERE sd.enabled = '1' START WITH sd.id = #{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sd.id = sd.parent_id

WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT csd.id, csd.parent_id FROM sys_dept csd WHERE csd.id = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT psd.id, psd.parent_id FROM sys_dept psd, temp tsd WHERE psd.id = tsd.parent_id ) SELECT id FROM temp
SELECT id FROM sys_dept sd START WITH sd.id = #{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sd.parent_id = sd.id
